```

author: metaclaw_agent
```

arguments.content:
---
created_at: 2026-03-30T09:00:00+08:00
author: metaclaw_agent
status: done
---

# Weekly Work Plan: March 30 – April 3, 2026

**Sprint:** Sprint 8 Week 2  
**Focus:** Documentation Organization  
**Team:** Backend Engineering (Alex, Bai, Chen, Dana)

---

## Weekly Goals

### Primary Objectives
1. **Organize and standardize project documentation** across all backend services
2. **Complete outstanding documentation for Sprint 7 features** before Sprint 8 development accelerates
3. **Establish documentation standards and templates** for future sprints
4. **Update API reference documentation** to reflect current v2.3.0 state

### Success Criteria
- All Markdown files follow standardized frontmatter format
- API documentation is current and auto-generation pipeline is functional
- Team documentation guidelines are documented and shared
- Zero documentation-related technical debt from Sprint 7

---

## Daily Task Arrangements

### Monday, March 30

| Time | Task | Owner | Priority |
|------|------|-------|----------|
| Morning | Review and organize day11/ documentation materials | Alex | High |
| Morning | Finalize Sprint 7 Review formal documentation | Alex | High |
| Afternoon | Create documentation style guide template | Alex | Medium |
| Afternoon | Set up automated doc generation pipeline (Action A3) | Casey | High |
| EOD | Team sync: documentation standards overview | All | Medium |

**Daily Deliverable:** Documentation style guide v1.0

---

### Tuesday, March 31

| Time | Task | Owner | Priority |
|------|------|-------|----------|
| Morning | Document payment integration patterns (Action A5) | Jordan | High |
| Morning | Create API v2.3.0 changelog (Action A2) | Taylor | High |
| Afternoon | Review and update authentication module docs | Alex | Medium |
| Afternoon | Draft notification system technical spec | Bai | Medium |
| EOD | Documentation review session | All | Medium |

**Daily Deliverables:**
- Payment integration pattern documentation
- API v2.3.0 changelog
- Auth module documentation updated

---

### Wednesday, April 1

| Time | Task | Owner | Priority |
|------|------|-------|----------|
| Morning | Complete admin dashboard UX improvements (Action A1) | Sam | High |
| Morning | Review and finalize API documentation | Alex | High |
| Afternoon | Organize and archive Sprint 7 retrospectives | Alex | Medium |
| Afternoon | Update mobile responsive layout documentation | Taylor | Medium |
| EOD | Mid-week progress check | All | Low |

**Daily Deliverable:**
- Admin dashboard UX improvements complete (Action A1)
- All API docs reviewed and current

---

### Thursday, April 2

| Time | Task | Owner | Priority |
|------|------|-------|----------|
| Morning | Conduct documentation audit across all services | Dana | High |
| Morning | Finalize API changelog (Action A2 due) | Taylor | High |
| Afternoon | Create user profile management technical spec | Bai | Medium |
| Afternoon | Review and consolidate rate limiting documentation | Casey | Medium |
| EOD | Documentation sprint — fix gaps identified | All | Medium |

**Daily Deliverables:**
- Documentation audit report
- API changelog finalized
- Rate limiting documentation complete

---

### Friday, April 3

| Time | Task | Owner | Priority |
|------|------|-------|----------|
| Morning | Finalize all documentation updates | All | High |
| Morning | Update team wiki with new documentation standards | Alex | High |
| Afternoon | Schedule security audit with external firm (Action A4) | Alex | High |
| Afternoon | Prepare weekly summary report for stakeholders | Alex | Medium |
| EOD | Week 2 retrospective and Week 3 planning preview | All | Low |

**Daily Deliverables:**
- Weekly summary report
- Security audit scheduled
- Documentation standards published to wiki

---

## Action Items from Sprint 7 Review

| ID | Task | Owner | Due Date | Status |
|----|------|-------|----------|--------|
| A1 | Complete admin dashboard UX improvements | Sam | April 1 (Wed) | 🔄 In Progress |
| A2 | Create API v2.3.0 changelog | Taylor | April 2 (Thu) | 🔄 In Progress |
| A3 | Set up automated doc generation pipeline | Casey | This week | 🔄 In Progress |
| A4 | Schedule security audit with external firm | Alex | April 3 (Fri) | ⏳ Scheduled |
| A5 | Document payment integration patterns | Jordan | This week | 🔄 In Progress |
| A6 | Update personal task boards for Sprint 8 | All | Complete | ✅ Done |

---

## Documentation Standards Reference

### Required Frontmatter for All Markdown Files
```yaml
---
created_at: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS+08:00
author: metaclaw_agent
status: done | draft | in_review
---
```

### Filename Format
```
YYYYMMDD_description.md
```

### Document Structure
1. Title and metadata
2. Overview/Executive Summary
3. Detailed sections with headers
4. Action items (if applicable)
5. References and links

---

## Notes

- Daily standups will be async in Slack (experiment from retrospective feedback)
- Documentation sprints scheduled for Friday afternoons
- All documentation must pass review before marking as "done"
- Questions or blockers should be raised immediately in #backend-dev channel

---

*Plan created: March 30, 2026*  
*Next review: April 3, 2026*
